title: Shader Benchmark for LLMs
abstract: A specialized benchmark tool for evaluating and comparing the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) in handling complex shader operations, ensuring optimal visual effects in real-time applications.
abstract_zh: 这工具就是专门用来给大模型做体检的，主要是检查它们处理复杂着色运算的能力，保证实时应用里的视觉效果超赞。简直就是实时特效的守护神啊！
